name: catalog validator rejects an entry whose tier value is anything other than 1 or 2
command:
mkdir -p sources && printf 'id: bad
source_class: financial-industry
tier: 3
applies_to: [node]
' > sources/bad.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-source.sh" --source sources/bad.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'tier' err.txt && grep -q '3' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
